utterances.speaker: Director
utterances.text: Listen Joey , I got a problem , I just got a call from my dance captain , he is having a relationship crisis and can not get out of Long Island .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So , does that mean the audition is off ?

utterances.speaker: Director
utterances.text: Listen Joey , seeing as you have got the most experience , I want you to take these dancers and show them the combination .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I want you to take these dancers and show them the combination .

utterances.speaker: Director
utterances.text: Aw come on Joey , it is easy .

utterances.speaker: Director
utterances.text: You know , it is hand , hand , head , head , up , pas de bouree , pas de bouree , big turn here , grand sissone , sissone , sissone , slide back , step , step , step , and jazz hands !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is ah , step ... ity , step and jazz hands .
